This ensures your device stays powered up whether you're using maps or streaming music during your commute or travels. What's more, it support fast charging up to 60W, perfect compatible with all android & USB C device. (NOTE: Only work with USB-C connector. It does not work with Lightning connector.)

[Ideal Gift]: The LISEN cigarette lighter usb charger, compatible with most 12v vehicles and 24v trucks or recreational vehicle, features dual ports PD 3.0 (36W) & QC (18W), ensuring compatibility with all cables and eliminating the need to worry about compatibility. This ensures that your family or friends stay powered up wherever they are. Not only is it practical and cost-effective, but with its sleek design and advanced technology, it's the ideal car essentials interior accessories for their daily commute, road trips, or travels. It's the perfect gift for friends or family.

[24/7 After Sales Service]: A 2-year warranty is included with this type c car charger for iphone car accessories. Please get in touch with us if you have any queries or issues. Our dependable customer care will guarantee online 24/7 and respond to you with a suitable solution.
